---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "feat(<scope>): brief description"
labels: "enhancement"
---

## Description

What capability is missing? Why is it needed?

## Use Case

When and why would this feature be useful?

Example:
```bash
vex --target example.com --new-option value
```

## Proposed Implementation

High-level approach:
1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three (optional)

## Impact

- Performance implications (if any)
- Backward compatibility (breaking or non-breaking)
- Configuration changes needed

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Feature implemented and functional
- [ ] CLI option documented in `docs/CLI_REFERENCE.md`
- [ ] Tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Metrics/output updated if relevant
- [ ] Example added to `docs/EXAMPLES.md` (if applicable)
